file_insights.purpose: Main activity layout with persistent SyncStatusBar component and placeholder content area
key_components: Placeholder TextViews for app title and instructions

patterns_discovered.description: SyncStatusBar custom component embedded at top-level with full width and wrap_content height
ScrollView uses layout_weight=1 with height=0dp to expand and fill remaining vertical space
patterns_discovered.significance: Standard Android pattern for responsive layouts

patterns_discovered.description: Temporary TextViews included for UI preview with clear semantic content
patterns_discovered.significance: Supports iterative development and testing during early stages

patterns_discovered.description: Multi-line comment block explains layout structure, component hierarchy, and purpose

gotchas_discovered.detail: fillViewport='true' is necessary for ScrollView child to fill available space when content is smaller than viewport
gotchas_discovered.impact: Without this, ScrollView may not expand properly in LinearLayout with weight
Component must exist in exact package location or layout inflation will fail at runtime

gotchas_discovered.detail: Padding (16dp) applied only to inner LinearLayout, not ScrollView, affecting visual spacing
gotchas_discovered.impact: ScrollView content positioning differs from potential expectations if padding was applied higher up

approach_outcome.description: Activity layout created successfully with SyncStatusBar persistent component and scrollable content area
approach_outcome.execution_notes: Single-attempt success; layout follows Android Material Design patterns with proper hierarchy and flexibility

recommendations.suggestion: Replace placeholder TextViews with FragmentContainerView or include tag for dynamic content loading
Add android:contentDescription attributes to TextViews for screen reader support
Extract hardcoded dimensions (16dp, 24sp, 14sp) to dimen.xml resource file for consistency
Consider adding constraint-based alternative layout for landscape orientation or large screens
Verify SyncStatusBar properly handles its own expand/collapse state without requiring parent activity coordination
